brand.name: SL Farmer
brand.description: SL Farmer is a Sri Lankan family farm offering naturally grown produce through a public website with product, gallery, founder, and contact information.

pages.title: Home
pages.summary: Hero section, about section, founder story, featured products, and contact details.

pages.title: Products
pages.summary: Full public product catalog with prices and availability badges.

pages.title: Gallery
pages.summary: Farming process details and photo gallery.

pages.title: Contact
pages.summary: Phone, email, WhatsApp, address, map, and contact form.

founders.name: Jayasanka Peiris
founders.summary: Jayasanka Peiris created SL Farmer to grow premium, naturally cultivated produce while honoring family farming traditions.

founders.name: Upul Premakumara
founders.summary: Upul Premakumara leads practical farm operations, crop health, and field discipline across SL Farmer.

products.name: Pineapple
products.description: Sweet, juicy pineapples harvested at peak ripeness. Perfect for fresh eating, smoothies, or cooking.
products.descriptionSi: පැසුණු අවස්ථාවේ අස්වැන්න ගන්නා මිහිරි සහ රසවත් අන්නාසි. නැවුම්ව කෑමට, ස්මූති සඳහා හෝ පිසීමට සුදුසුයි.

products.name: Pineapple Plant
products.description: Healthy, mature pineapple plants ready for cultivation. Grow your own premium pineapples at home.
products.descriptionSi: වගාවට සූදානම් සෞඛ්‍ය සම්පන්න අන්නාසි පැළ. ඔබේම ගෙදර ප්‍රිමියම් අන්නාසි වගා කිරීම ආරම්භ කළ හැක.

products.name: Ginger
products.description: Hearty ginger with intense aroma for cooking, herbal teas, and natural remedies.
products.descriptionSi: ආහාර පිසීමට, ඖෂධීය තේ සඳහා සහ ස්වභාවික ප්‍රතිකාර සඳහා සුදුසු ශක්තිමත් සුවඳ ඇති ඉඟුරු.

products.name: Ginger Plant
products.description: Fresh ginger rhizomes for planting. Start your own ginger garden with our premium quality plants.
products.descriptionSi: වගා කිරීම සඳහා නැවුම් ඉඟුරු කඳන්. අපගේ ප්‍රිමියම් ගුණාත්මක පැළ සමඟ ඔබේම ඉඟුරු වගාව ආරම්භ කරන්න.

products.name: Cinnamon
products.description: Pure Ceylon cinnamon sticks and powder. Premium quality cinnamon with authentic flavor and aroma.
products.descriptionSi: පිරිසිදු සීලෝන් කුරුඳු කූරු සහ කුරුඳු කුඩු. සත්‍ය රසය සහ සුවඳ ඇති ප්‍රිමියම් ගුණාත්මක කුරුඳු.

products.name: Cinnamon Plant
products.description: True Ceylon cinnamon saplings. Grow your own cinnamon tree and harvest premium quality cinnamon bark.
products.descriptionSi: සත්‍ය සීලෝන් කුරුඳු පැළ. ඔබේම කුරුඳු ගස වගා කර ප්‍රිමියම් ගුණාත්මක කුරුඳු පොත්ත අස්වැන්න කරගන්න.

products.name: Scotch Bonnet Pepper (Nai Miris)
products.description: Fiery and flavorful Sri Lankan hot peppers. Perfect for adding authentic spice to your dishes.
products.descriptionSi: රසවත් සහ දැඩි තික්ෂ්ණතාවය ඇති ශ්‍රී ලාංකික නයි මිරිස්. ආහාරයට සත්‍ය රසයක් එක් කිරීමට සුදුසුයි.

How do I contact SL Farmer?

hi?

entries.title: Public Website Scope
entries.answer: I only answer questions about the public SL Farmer website. I do not handle the admin panel, dashboard, permissions, user records, or internal management tools.
suggestions: How do I contact SL Farmer?

can you help with the admin panel?
can you help with the admin panel please
please can you help with the admin panel
hi, can you help with the admin panel
hello, can you help with the admin panel
please tell me, can you help with the admin panel
i want to know, can you help with the admin panel
entries.answerSi: මම පිළිතුරු දෙන්නේ SL Farmer පොදු වෙබ් අඩවිය ගැන පමණි. admin panel, dashboard, permissions, user records හෝ internal management tools ගැන මම පිළිතුරු නොදෙමි.
suggestionsSi: How do I contact SL Farmer?

entries.title: Website Overview
entries.answer: SL Farmer is a Sri Lankan family farm website focused on naturally grown produce. The public site covers featured products, the full products page, the farm gallery, the founder story, and customer contact options.
sampleQuestions: what is sl farmer
what is sl farmer?
what is sl farmer please
please what is sl farmer
hi, what is sl farmer
hello, what is sl farmer
please tell me, what is sl farmer
i want to know, what is sl farmer
entries.answerSi: SL Farmer කියන්නේ ස්වභාවිකව වගා කරන නිෂ්පාදන සඳහා වූ ශ්‍රී ලාංකික පවුල් ගොවිපල වෙබ් අඩවියකි. පොදු වෙබ් අඩවියේ featured products, full products page, farm gallery, founder story සහ customer contact options ඇතුළත් වේ.

entries.title: Product Catalog
entries.answer: SL Farmer publicly lists these products: - Pineapple: Rs. 700 per kg - Pineapple Plant: Rs. 50 per plant - Ginger: Rs. 1,000 per kg - Ginger Plant: Rs. 900 per plant - Cinnamon: Rs. 675 per 100g - Cinnamon Plant: Rs. 100 per plant - Scotch Bonnet Pepper (Nai Miris): Rs. 390 per 250g
sampleQuestions: what products do you sell
what products do you sell?
what products do you sell please
please what products do you sell
hi, what products do you sell
hello, what products do you sell
please tell me, what products do you sell
i want to know, what products do you sell
entries.answerSi:
SL Farmer පොදු ලෙස දක්වන නිෂ්පාදන මෙන්න:
- අන්නාසි: Rs. 700 කිලෝ එකකට
- අන්නාසි පැළ: Rs. 50 පැළයකට
- ඉඟුරු: Rs. 1,000 කිලෝ එකකට
- ඉඟුරු පැළ: Rs. 900 පැළයකට
- කුරුඳු: Rs. 675 100g සඳහා
- කුරුඳු පැළ: Rs. 100 පැළයකට
- නයි මිරිස්: Rs. 390 250g සඳහා

entries.title: How to Order
entries.answer: The public website does not show a checkout cart. To place an order, contact SL Farmer through WhatsApp, phone, email, or the contact form.

entries.answer: The website says the produce is delivered fresh to your door, but detailed delivery zones, shipping fees, and timelines are not listed publicly. For exact delivery details, contact SL Farmer directly.
